meaning: n.龙涎香(一种脂肪物质,用以制香料)
examples: While fresh, ambergris is dark, with flabby consistency and a nauseating odor.
Indeed, it is said that you can still find ambergris in the ladies' favorite Chanel No. 5.
Ambergris has even been compared to a fine wine, as its quality increases the longer it has spent aging.
It's whale vomit - known as ambergris, which is still sometimes used to make perfume.
McAfee's home on Ambergris Caye, an island off Belize's mainland, was raided after Faull's death.
